title: We are drowning in news, but starving for context.
body:
Most news apps are designed to keep you scrolling. They rely on outrage and speed to capture your attention. At Headlinne, we wanted to build something different. We believe the goal of journalism should be to inform you, not to overwhelm you.

Our philosophy is rooted in the idea that technology should serve your curiosity instead of exploiting it. We use AI not to guess what you might click on, but to help you find the stories that actually matter to your life. It is about stripping away the noise so you can focus on the signal.

A smarter news experience means knowing when to stop. It means giving you a balanced view of the day without the constant pressure to keep refreshing. We want you to feel more informed when you put your phone down, not more anxious.

Building this requires a different approach to how we handle information. It requires restraint. We are trying to prove that you can build a sustainable product by respecting the reader's time.
cta: If you are tired of the endless scroll, come see how we are rethinking the news at HEADLINNE.com.
